name: General TAPS Volunteer Opportunities
whatItProvides: Enables individuals to support TAPS seminars, staff check-in tables, assist with local admin, or coordinate regional events.

name: Legacy and Military Mentor
whatItProvides: Enables active duty service members or veterans to mentor bereaved military children and teenagers during TAPS Good Grief Camps.

name: Become a TAPS Peer Mentor
whatItProvides: Survivors who are at least 18 months past their loss can complete training to act as peer mentors for newly grieving survivors.

name: Team TAPS Endurance Program
whatItProvides: Athletic and endurance fundraising group. Members run, walk, or cycle in major national races to raise funds and awareness for TAPS.

name: Golf4TAPS Fundraisers
whatItProvides: Community-led golf tournaments and fundraisers that direct proceeds towards supporting grieving military families.

name: teams4taps Sports Engagement
whatItProvides: Coordinates with professional sports teams and college athletics to host survivors at games and honor fallen heroes during ceremonies.

name: Shop to Support TAPS
whatItProvides: Retail partnerships and charity shopping stores (like the TAPS online store) where proceeds benefit the TAPS mission.

name: Share Your Story
whatItProvides: Enables survivors to submit articles, quotes, or videos to TAPS Magazine and news pages to honor their fallen loved ones and share hope.

name: Memorial Hero Wall
whatItProvides: An online memorial wall where survivors can post photos, share memories, and pay tribute to their fallen military loved ones.
